questions.question: Placeholder question 1 about security concepts. Which placeholder security model applies to this scenario?

questions.question: Placeholder question 5 about security concepts. This placeholder tests understanding of Zero Trust principles.
questions.explanation: Placeholder explanation: Option B correctly applies Zero Trust principles. Option A relies on perimeter-based security which contradicts Zero Trust.

questions.explanation: Placeholder explanation: MFA Method 1 provides phishing-resistant authentication. Methods 2 and 3 are more vulnerable to interception.

questions.explanation: Placeholder explanation: Tool 3 provides the required compliance reporting. Tool 1 only handles policy enforcement.

questions.question: Placeholder question 9 about security concepts. This easy placeholder tests basic security terminology.
